final:
module sram_16bit (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] sram_storage [0:15]; // 16x16-bit sram_storage

    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            sram_storage[address] <= data_in; // Write data to sram_storage
        end
        data_out = sram_storage[address]; // Read data from sram_storage
    end
endmodule
